steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a single HTML file that meets all the requirements for the quadratic formula derivation slide.

First, I'll write the HTML/CSS code with inline styling to create the slide exactly as specified.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Deriving the Quadratic Formula</title>
    <sty

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to verify the slide by rendering it to a PNG and examining the result. I'll use Playwright to render the HTML to a 1920x1080 PNG.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to examine the rendered PNG to verify if the slide meets all requirements. Let me check the image.

I can see that the slide has been rendered, but there are several issues that need to be addressed:

1. The equations are not properly formatted with proper fractions (they're using inline slashes instead of horizontal fraction bars)
2. The square root symbol (√) is not properly rendered as a radical symbol that spans the content
3. The ± symbol is not properly rendered (it appears as "+/-" text)
